description_long: This awning structure features a large, flat canopy supported by a robust frame with vertical posts and horizontal beams. The canopy surface appears to be made of a solid, opaque material, likely metal or composite, with a wood-textured floor above and a dark railing running along the perimeter. The awning is attached to a building facade, partially enclosed by three walls, and provides a sheltered area beneath. The railing is composed of horizontal bars and vertical supports, offering both safety and a modern aesthetic. The open space beneath the awning allows for passage or use as a covered walkway or patio, while the upper platform could serve as a balcony or terrace.
description: A large, flat awning with a wood-textured upper platform, dark metal railings, and a sturdy post-and-beam support structure, attached to a building facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open sheltered area beneath the awning, the wood-textured upper platform, and the dark railing along the edge.
description_view_1: Top-down rear view highlighting the solid wall enclosure and the open platform area, with the railing visible at the far end.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the awning, the supporting posts, and the open window and door cutouts in the wall.
description_view_3: Overhead view emphasizing the rectangular canopy, the railing perimeter, and the supporting posts beneath.
attribute_mounting_location: attached to building facade with posts anchored to ground and walls
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with vertical posts and horizontal beams
